full_text:
Zhuge Yi (Daohui) 諸葛頤 (道回)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Yi (諸葛頤), styledDaohui (道回). The grandson of Zhuge Dan and son of Zhuge Jing. Zhuge Yi was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
